notifyCancelledEntrants() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.CancelledFragment
Shows a dialog for the organizer to type a message, then sends a notification to all entrants with status "Cancelled".
notifyEnrolledEntrants() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.EnrolledFragment
Shows a dialog for the organizer to type a message, then sends a notification to all entrants with status "Enrolled".
notifyInvitedEntrants() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.InvitedFragment
Shows a dialog for the organizer to type a message, then sends a notification to all entrants with status "Invited".

Verifies that clicking the notify waitlist button does not crash the fragment.

Verifies that the notify waitlist button is displayed.
notifyWaitlistButton_isEnabled() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragmentTest
Verifies that the notify waitlist button is enabled.
notifyWaitlistEntrants() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragment
Shows a dialog for the organizer to type a message, then sends a notification to all entrants with status "Waitlist".
